skills.name: booking-policy
skills.description: Mamsa (مَمسَى) booking rules an agent needs before advising a guest — how nightly totals are calculated, the three cancellation policies and their refund tiers, check-in times, and why an agent cannot complete a booking on a user's behalf.

skills.name: search-rentals
skills.description: Search and inspect Mamsa (مَمسَى) short-term rental listings in Saudi Arabia — filter by city, unit type, guest capacity, nightly price and rating, then read full details and guest reviews.
